title: Il mago per forza
director: Marino Girolami, Marcello Marchesi, Vittorio Metz
writer: Marino Girolami, Marcello Marchesi, Vittorio Metz
actors: Tino Scotti, Isa Barzizza, Aroldo Tieri
plot: In the prison of San Vittore there is, among other detainees, a strange type that they call "Il Cavaliere". The latter suffers a conviction for theft and his fellow prisoners have a certain respect for him.
